Speedup: 0.006093%                                                                                       \n          The access patterns for writes to compressible memory are not well suited for the L2 Compression unit. As a   \n          consequence, 20.3x the data written to the L2 cache has to be communicated to the L2 Compression unit. Try    \n          maximizing local coherence for the write operations to compressible memory. For example, avoid writes with    \n          large strides as they lead to partial accesses to many L2 cache lines. Speedup: 0.06763%                                                                                        \n          The access patterns for writes to compressible memory are not well suited for the L2 Compression unit. Try    \n          maximizing local coherence for the write operations to compressible memory. For example, avoid writes with    \n          large strides as they lead to partial accesses to many L2 cache lines. Speedup: 33.33%                                                                                          \n          A wave of thread blocks is defined as the maximum number of blocks that can be executed in parallel on the    \n          target GPU. This kernel launch results in 2 full waves and a partial wave of 144 thread blocks.  \n          Under the assumption of a uniform execution duration of all thread blocks, this partial wave may account for  \n          up to 33.3% of the total runtime of this kernel. Speedup: 0.05403%                                                                                        \n          The access patterns for writes to compressible memory are not well suited for the L2 Compression unit. As a   \n          consequence, 11.5x the data written to the L2 cache has to be communicated to the L2 Compression unit. Try    \n          maximizing local coherence for the write operations to compressible memory. For example, avoid writes with    \n          large strides as they lead to partial accesses to many L2 cache lines. Speedup: 0.1063%                                                                                         \n          The access patterns for writes to compressible memory are not well suited for the L2 Compression unit. Speedup: 0.08347%                                                                                        \n          The access patterns for writes to compressible memory are not well suited for the L2 Compression unit. As a   \n          consequence, 6.5x the data written to the L2 cache has to be communicated to the L2 Compression unit. Try     \n          maximizing local coherence for the write operations to compressible memory. For example, avoid writes with    \n          large strides as they lead to partial accesses to many L2 cache lines. Instead, try accessing fewer overall   \n          cache lines by modifying many values per cache line with each warp's execution of a write operation.          \n\n    Section: Launch Statistics\n    -------------------------------- --------------- ---------------\n    Metric Name                          Metric Unit    Metric Value\n    -------------------------------- --------------- ---------------\n    Block Size                                                   128\n    Cluster Scheduling Policy                           PolicySpread\n    Cluster Size                                                   0\n    Function Cache Configuration                     CachePreferNone\n    Grid Size                                                      1\n    Registers Per Thread             register/thread              32\n    Shared Memory Configuration Size           Kbyte           32.77\n    Driver Shared Memory Per Block       Kbyte/block            1.02\n    Dynamic Shared Memory Per Block       byte/block               0\n    Static Shared Memory Per Block        byte/block               0\n    # SMs                                         SM             148\n    Stack Size                                                  1024\n    Threads                                   thread             128\n    # TPCs                                                        74\n    Enabled TPC IDs                                              all\n    Uses Green Context                                             0\n    Waves Per SM                                                0.00\n    -------------------------------- --------------- ---------------\n\n    OPT   Est. For example, avoid writes with    \n          large strides as they lead to partial accesses to many L2 cache lines. Instead, try accessing fewer overall   \n          cache lines by modifying many values per cache line with each warp's execution of a write operation.          \n\n    Section: Launch Statistics\n    -------------------------------- --------------- ---------------\n    Metric Name                          Metric Unit    Metric Value\n    -------------------------------- --------------- ---------------\n    Block Size                                                   128\n    Cluster Scheduling Policy                           PolicySpread\n    Cluster Size                                                   0\n    Function Cache Configuration                     CachePreferNone\n    Grid Size                                                      1\n    Registers Per Thread             register/thread              32\n    Shared Memory Configuration Size           Kbyte           32.77\n    Driver Shared Memory Per Block       Kbyte/block            1.02\n    Dynamic Shared Memory Per Block       byte/block               0\n    Static Shared Memory Per Block        byte/block               0\n    # SMs                                         SM             148\n    Stack Size                                                  1024\n    Threads                                   thread             128\n    # TPCs                                                        74\n    Enabled TPC IDs                                              all\n    Uses Green Context                                             0\n    Waves Per SM                                                0.00\n    -------------------------------- --------------- ---------------\n\n    OPT   Est. For example, avoid writes with    \n          large strides as they lead to partial accesses to many L2 cache lines. Instead, try accessing fewer overall   \n          cache lines by modifying many values per cache line with each warp's execution of a write operation.          \n\n    Section: Launch Statistics\n    -------------------------------- --------------- ---------------\n    Metric Name                          Metric Unit    Metric Value\n    -------------------------------- --------------- ---------------\n    Block Size                                                   128\n    Cluster Scheduling Policy                           PolicySpread\n    Cluster Size                                                   0\n    Function Cache Configuration                     CachePreferNone\n    Grid Size                                                      1\n    Registers Per Thread             register/thread              40\n    Shared Memory Configuration Size           Kbyte          135.17\n    Driver Shared Memory Per Block       Kbyte/block            1.02\n    Dynamic Shared Memory Per Block       byte/block               0\n    Static Shared Memory Per Block       Kbyte/block            7.18\n    # SMs                                         SM             148\n    Stack Size                                                  1024\n    Threads                                   thread             128\n    # TPCs                                                        74\n    Enabled TPC IDs                                              all\n    Uses Green Context                                             0\n    Waves Per SM                                                0.00\n    -------------------------------- --------------- ---------------\n\n    OPT   Est.
